theorem:  mergesort_correct
sample:   0
attempt:  fix_7

[proof]
intro l
by_cases h : l.length < 2
· have hm : mergesort l = l := by
    unfold mergesort
    rw [if_pos h]
  constructor
  · rw [hm]
    cases l with
    | nil =>
      exact Sorted.nil
    | cons x xs =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys =>
        simp at h
        linarith
  · rw [hm]
    unfold Permut
    intro t
    rfl
· constructor
  · unfold mergesort
    rw [if_neg h]
    by_cases hs : Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))
    · exact hs
    · exfalso
      exact hs (by assumption)
  · unfold mergesort
    rw [if_neg h]
    unfold Permut
    intro t
    rfl

[lean error]
location:
          · exfalso
            exact hs (by assumption)
                        ^
        · unfold mergesort
error: Tactic `assumption` failed
T : Type
inst✝² : Preorder T
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
l : List T
h : ¬l.length < 2
hs : ¬Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))
⊢ Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))

location:
          intro t
          rfl
         ^
error: Tactic `rfl` failed: The left-hand side
  count1 (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l))) t
is not definitionally equal to the right-hand side
  count1 l t
case neg.right
T : Type
inst✝² : Preorder T
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
l : List T
h : ¬l.length < 2
t : T
⊢ count1 (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l))) t = count1 l t
